title: Sons of The American Legion
body:
The Sons of The American Legion (SAL) carries the Legion's mission forward into the next generation. Squadron 118 is open to male descendants of veterans — with no age limit — and plays an active role in Post 118's programs and activities.

Whether you're a young adult just starting out or retired and looking for camaraderie, the Sons of The American Legion offers brotherhood, service opportunities, and meaningful connections with other veterans' families. We support the Legion's programs, volunteer at Post 118 events and fundraisers, and foster a new generation of service-minded members.

There's no age minimum or maximum—only a commitment to service and the Legion's values.
